{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Collaborative Whiteboard{% endblock %} {% block head %} {% for href in tavle_extra_stylesheets %} {% endfor %} {# Embed mode (?embed=1): when the board is iframed by a parent app, nudge toolbar layout for a narrower viewport; connection + user presence stay visible. CSS-only — same Alpine app everywhere. #} {% if embed %} {% endif %} {# Hide name/loading overlays before Alpine when the viewer is already known #} {% endblock %} {% block body_attrs %}class="bg-gray-100 overflow-hidden{% if embed %} tavle-embed{% endif %}{% if nohud %} tavle-nohud{% endif %}{% if readonly %} tavle-view-only{% endif %}" data-embed="{{ '1' if embed else '0' }}" data-view-only="{{ '1' if readonly else '0' }}"{% endblock %} {% block body %}

()


{% endblock %}
